name: create-bkn
description: Guides creation of BKN (Business Knowledge Network) definition files following v2.0.1 spec. Covers network, object_type, relation_type, action_type, concept_group. Use when creating knowledge networks, BKN files, object types, relation types, action types, concept groups, or when user asks to model business knowledge in BKN format. When kweaver-core is also loaded, use it to run kweaver CLI (auth, bkn push) after files exist.
